title: The Crew Splits Up
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on the crew splits up, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Splits Up. The Straw Hats’ victories against Baroque Works begin changing the momentum in Alubarna. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's the trump card of this weapon!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: However! As it can only be used once, it should be your last resort!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Consider yourself doomed if you miss...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Has been hurting for the past while, am I right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I bet you can hardly even stand up anymore...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She can still get up after that?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...do you have any idea how much pain that girl's been through?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: breaking one leg... two legs... or even three legs...!

summary: This part develops the crew splits up and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
